overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through a large industrial parking lot filled with various parked vehicles. The character navigates between cars and warehouse buildings under bright midday sun with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large outdoor parking lot with rows of parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the parking lot between rows of parked cars

entered.detail: dark red sedan parked in the left row
silver commercial van with dark tinted windows
metallic green sports coupe with silver rims
large gray industrial warehouse building with multiple garage bays
distant brown mountain range under clear blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious asphalt parking lot filled with various parked vehicles including sedans, vans, and sports cars. Industrial warehouse buildings stand in the background with mountains visible in the distance under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between parking rows and warehouse perimeter

events.description: character makes a sharp left turn to change direction toward the warehouse

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking past a blue sedan toward the warehouse building

segments.scene_description: The character executes a left turn and walks past a blue sedan, heading toward the warehouse building. A yellow SUV comes into view on the right as the character leaves the dense parking rows behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse perimeter with parked vehicles along the wall

events.description: character turns right to walk parallel to the warehouse building

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the beige warehouse building passing parked cars

entered.detail: long beige industrial warehouse with vertical siding and roll-up doors
white commercial van parked near building corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the perimeter of a beige warehouse building with roll-up doors, passing various parked vehicles including vans and sedans. The camera follows closely as the character navigates the narrow space between the building and parked cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open tarmac area with distant industrial buildings

events.description: character rounds the corner of the warehouse into open tarmac

agents.ego_description: walking across the open asphalt area toward distant buildings

entered.detail: tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbars
low industrial buildings and structures in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the warehouse perimeter into a vast open tarmac area. Distant industrial buildings and a power line tower become visible as the character walks toward the horizon with mountains looming in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a crowded industrial parking lot that gradually opens into a vast, desolate tarmac. It begins with the character navigating through dense rows of sedans, vans, and sports cars under a bright midday sun with distant mountains on the horizon. As the character executes a left turn past a blue sedan and a yellow SUV, the scene shifts away from the packed vehicles and toward the perimeter of a beige warehouse building. The camera then follows closely as the character weaves through the narrow space between the building's roll-up doors and remaining parked cars before finally emerging into a wide-open expanse. This open area reveals distant industrial structures and a power line tower as the character walks toward the looming mountains in the distance.
